experience.title: Operations Research Analyst
experience.description: Initiated and managed program to test incoming radiation detection equipment into New York, New Jersey and Connecticut. Since 2009, the project has tested over 25 million dollars worth of equipment and more than 10,000 units.

experience.title: Information Technology Specialist
experience.description: Data Collection and Test Manager for the Department of Homeland Security and NYPD collaborative acquisition program for a roadway deployed radiation detector prototype.

experience.title: Information Technology Specialist
experience.description: Designed data structures and developed systems for science related database applications.

extra_fields.awards: Numerous awards for both team and individual performance
